name: Northern Bus Lines
registry_source: MA Sec of State Corp Search (no accessible match)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). Confirmed operating at 45 Dan Rd Ste 125, Canton MA 02021 (Tripadvisor lists 'Northern Bus Lines' as school and coach bus service, M-F 9-5, Sat 8-2). No SAFER record found under 'Northern Bus Lines', 'Northern Bus Lines Inc', or 'Northern Bus'. BBB Canton MA bus lines directory does not list Northern Bus Lines. Note: 45 Dan Rd also hosts ACG Delivery LLC (USDOT 3460058) - unrelated freight carrier. MA SOS web search portal is interactive-only and could not return entity details via WebFetch. Small intrastate school/coach operator.

name: Integrated Tech Bus Svc
notes: Likely a data-quality mismatch. The address 960 King Hwy Ste 1, Kalamazoo MI 49001 is occupied by 'Integrated Technology Business Services LLC' (ITBS), a Computer-Related Consulting Services firm (NAICS computer consulting), in business since 2007, ~10 employees, ~$670K revenue, phone (269) 547-9530, website itbs.us. ITBS is NOT a bus operator. No FMCSA SAFER record found under 'Integrated Tech Bus', 'Integrated Tech', or 'Integrated Transportation' at this address. The source list entry 'Integrated Tech Bus Svc' appears to be an erroneous classification of ITBS (the 'Bus' in 'Tech Bus' = 'Business', not motor bus). No USDOT.

name: WCBC Professional Bus Svc
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate, very small or defunct). No SAFER record for 'WCBC', 'WCBC Professional Bus', 'Professional Bus' (Texas), or 'Paradise Bus'. No business presence found online at 329 County Road 3575, Paradise TX 76073 (Wise County); nearby address (239 County Road 3575) is MVP Performance Parts. 'WCBC' commonly resolves to West Coast Bus Charters (Australia) or Wrexham CBC (UK) - unrelated. The Paradise TX listing may be a home-based, dormant, or very small intrastate operator (acronym possibly 'Wise County Bus Company' or similar). Could not confirm via TX SOS without direct query access.

name: Administrative Bus Solutions
registry_source: WA Sec of State CCFS (no accessible match)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate or defunct). No SAFER record under 'Administrative Bus Solutions', 'Administrative Bus', or 'Administrative' in WA. No WA SOS CCFS hit returned via accessible searches (Bizapedia/OpenCorporates queries returned 410/404). 1608 S 1st Ave, Yakima WA 98902 is a commercial corridor but no current business presence matches 'Administrative Bus Solutions' in BBB, Yelp, Yakima Chamber, or D&B. Yakima-area school bus contracts are dominated by Yakima Minibus Co, NW Navigator, and district-operated fleets. Not listed in WSDOT Student Transportation Directory or WSDOT Public Transit Directory. Likely small intrastate school-bus contractor or paper entity.

name: Northwest Transportation
officers: William R. Legare (President - Northwest Transportation Service Inc, dissolved entity)
Bill Legare (President - Valley Transportation Corp, operating entity)
Kathleen M. Legare (President/Officer - Valley Transportation Corp)
entity_status: dissolved (Northwest Transportation Service Inc, RI #000028220, dissolved 1999-10-01); active (Valley Transportation Corp, RI #000014054, operating carrier at same address)
registry_source: RI Sec of State business search via b2bhint; D&B
notes: List entry 'Northwest Transportation' at 664 Front St, Woonsocket RI maps to a legacy entity. Northwest Transportation Service Inc (RI #000028220, inc. 1983, Pres. William R. Legare) was administratively DISSOLVED 10/01/1999. The active operating carrier at the same physical address (664 Front St, Woonsocket RI 02895) is Valley Transportation Corp (RI #000014054, est. 1979, Pres. Bill/Kathleen Legare) - USDOT 958044, MC-749362, 8 power units, 10 drivers, Satisfactory safety rating (2015), MCS-150 updated 04/15/2026, ACTIVE/AUTHORIZED for Passenger interstate. Both entities operated by the same Legare family. Valley Transportation Corp provides RI school bus service incl. RISE Prep Mayoral Academy, Mt. St. Charles Academy, and area before/after school programs. Treating Valley Transportation Corp as the FMCSA-registered successor/operating carrier for this list entry.
